summary: Completed comprehensive testing of max_locations (shop allowance cap) feature. All backend enforcement, platform dashboard UI, and tenant locations page UI tests passed. Regression tests (shop editing, public booking, isolation) also passed.
passed_tests: BACKEND: Create tenant with locations=1 -> max_locations=1, seeds 1 shop
BACKEND: POST /api/shops at cap -> 403 with correct error message
BACKEND: PATCH /platform/tenants/{id} max_locations=2 -> 200, allowance updated
BACKEND: POST /api/shops after raising cap -> 200, 2nd shop created
BACKEND: POST /api/shops at cap of 2 -> 403 with correct error message
BACKEND: PATCH max_locations=1 when tenant has 2 shops -> 400 with correct error
BACKEND: max_locations validation (0 and 51) -> 400
BACKEND: Create tenant with locations=2 -> seeds 2 shops with availability + appointment types
BACKEND: superbrides tenant is at 2/2 cap
FRONTEND PLATFORM: Table header shows 'Shops (used/max)'
FRONTEND PLATFORM: superbrides row shows '2 / 2' in clickable allowance cell
FRONTEND PLATFORM: Clicking allowance cell opens 'Shop Allowance' modal
FRONTEND PLATFORM: Modal has input field and Save button
FRONTEND PLATFORM: New Company modal has 'Shops Allowed (max)' field with data-testid='init-locations'
FRONTEND TENANT: superbrides at cap - Add Location button is DISABLED
FRONTEND TENANT: Limit notice shown: 'You've reached your plan's limit of 2 shops. Contact us to add more.'
FRONTEND TENANT: Shop allowance badge shows '2 of 2 shops used'
FRONTEND TENANT: 2 location cards displayed
REGRESSION: Shop edit (PATCH /api/shops/{id}) works correctly
REGRESSION: Public booking page lists both boutiques
REGRESSION: Isolation tests passed (35/35)

success_percentage.regression: 100% (shop edit, public booking, isolation tests passed)
